title: DMR: Craftable Eggs
description: Adds crafting recipes for all Dragon Mounts Remastered breeds, plus extras
body:
# Adds crafting recipes for all [DMR](https://modrinth.com/mod/dmr)'s Dragons types, plus extra ones from available custom breed datapacks

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Fire Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771944fd9c0d6b8a2f48a440829410cb8faf96ee.png)
![Ice Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4aecfb2d29b1ec84c7e036cdd3f90bf1e6bff3.png)
![Sculk Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d800e0b18dcea884536a6bf8fb7c966eb6bd8bd.png)

</details>


## Alternative to Exploration and Luck
I recommend using [a mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-dragon-eggs) which allows getting a dragon egg each time you kill the End Dragon.


As more custom breed datapacks are released, I will be updating with new recipes for these. If you made or found a datapack that does not have a crafting recipe, let me know on [Discord](https://discord.gg/atukJ6qJaQ) so I can add it. Thanks!

## Known Issue: "Deprecated Egg" in Recipes


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

When viewing the crafting recipes, the item labeled as **"Deprecated Egg" is a placeholder** that represents any dragon egg from Dragon Mounts Remastered. This includes eggs with specific breeds, such as:
- Aether Dragon Egg
- Nether Dragon Egg
- Fire Dragon Egg
- And others...

To craft using these recipes:
- Use any dragon egg from the mod, regardless of its breed.
- The placeholder text does not affect functionality, and the recipe will work as intended.

Unfortunately, this display issue cannot be resolved without modifying the game's language files via a resource pack. I appreciate your understanding!


</details>
